_comment: Synthesized agent-memory extraction corpus (the 60% slice of ticket 0012-0011). Gold triples follow the LlmExtractor contract (graph/extraction.rs DEFAULT_TRIPLE_PROMPT): subject/object are concrete entities as bare strings; relation is a lowercase short verb phrase in the model's own words; (subject, relation, object) is the match key (confidence is not graded). Open-vocabulary preference/task/state relations that no standard RE dataset (CaRB/WebNLG) covers. Includes negative cases (empty gold) to test precision against over-extraction, per the prompt's 'emit an empty list if there are none' rule.
